resolution_evidence: Status agreement was 24/30 and criterion agreement was 18/30. Repeated include-1 versus include-2 disagreements occurred for C0025, C0172, and C0175 despite the v5 precedence clarification, establishing systematic ambiguity in course operations versus interface, standard, or benchmark contributions. Status disagreements affected C0009, C0088, C0136, C0140, C0147, and C0198. The protocol therefore requires another substantive revision and fresh blind calibration before any main release.
